projects.label: projects
projects.title: Personal Projects
projects.subtitle: Selected works that showcase my approach to solving real-world problems through code.

codeSync.title: CodeSync
codeSync.description: A real-time collaborative code editor with integrated terminal, cursor presence, and language-aware syntax highlighting. Built for remote pair programming sessions.

metricsViz.title: MetricsViz
metricsViz.description: Open-source dashboard for visualizing system metrics with real-time charts, alerting rules, and customizable widget layouts.

neuralKit.title: NeuralKit
neuralKit.description: A lightweight neural network library for educational purposes. Build, train, and visualize simple networks entirely in the browser.

stowKit.title: StowKit
stowKit.description: A smart dotfiles manager that detects system differences, handles package dependencies, and symlinks configs across machines.

gatewayX.title: GatewayX
gatewayX.description: Lightweight API gateway with rate limiting, JWT auth, request transformation, and built-in observability. Designed for microservice architectures.
